description_long: This is a single athletic soccer cleat, predominantly blue with a textured synthetic upper and a large silver Nike Swoosh logo on the toe box. The shoe features a low-cut design with a padded collar and a standard criss-cross lacing system in matching blue. The lateral side displays the word 'PHANTOM' and a smaller Swoosh logo, while the heel has a pull tab and branding details. The sole is equipped with multiple conical studs, suitable for traction on grass or turf surfaces, though the tread pattern is not fully visible. The shoe shows signs of use, with some scuffing and dirt marks, especially on the toe and sides.
description: A blue Nike soccer cleat with a textured upper, silver Swoosh logos, and visible signs of wear. It features criss-cross laces and conical studs for traction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large silver Swoosh logo on the toe and the blue laces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the textured upper, lateral Swoosh, and the word 'PHANTOM'.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel tab, branding, and the back of the sole with visible studs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the lacing system, upper texture, and the medial Swoosh logo.
attribute_logo: Large silver Swoosh on toe box, smaller black Swoosh on lateral side
